title: NotSoCobblemon Allone's Additions
description:
This resourcepack/datapack adds some extra pokemons to the cobblemon mod, curently added pokemons are the lines of
-Haxorus 
-Houndoom 
-remodeled Ursaluna and Bloodmoon form
-Lokix
They are all animated(I tried) and textured with shinies.
body:
#### This is an addon for the [Cobblemon Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) that adds pokemons that aren't implemented by the base mod yet.
##### All the pokemons from this addon have custom models and animations, along with normal and shiny textures.

# -**Pokemons curently on the addon**:

- **Axew, Fraxure and Haxorus**: Can spawns in some cave biomes and near rivers but mainly in the **badlands**.
>(Axew is shoulder mountable)

- **Houndour and Houndoom**: Spawns commonly in the **nether**.

- **Blood Moon Ursaluna**: You may find it into **spooky** places, mainly at night.

- **Lokix and Nymble**: They aren't much rare in **plains** biomes.

#### Instalation guide:

Download the pack, them put it in your resource pack folder **and** in your world's datapack folder.

Have fun, hope u enjoy my pack!
